title: Before you start
body:
Welcome to Murmur Master. Your access has been provided by Imperial College London as part of your studies.

Before you continue, here's what you should know about your data:

What we collect
• Your account details: your name and email address.
• That you are an Imperial College London student (added automatically from your access code).
• How you use the app: which sounds and lessons you open, how long you spend, your progress, and your quiz and test answers (which answers you gave, whether they were correct, and how long you took).
• Basic technical information needed to run the app and send notifications.

We collect this from all Murmur Master users to run and improve the app. As an Imperial student, none of it is treated differently — except as described next.

What we share with Imperial College London
• We may share anonymised, group-level information about how the Imperial cohort uses the app — for example, how many students are active, typical time spent, and overall progress through the content.
• These reports are aggregated and cannot identify you individually. We will not share your name, email, or your individual results with Imperial unless you are separately asked for, and give, your explicit consent.

Your data, your rights
• Your data is handled in line with the Murmur Master Privacy Policy and UK data-protection law.
• You can request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data at any time by contacting us. Deleting your account ends your data collection.
• Your access through Imperial runs for 12 months and then ends; you can continue with a personal subscription afterwards if you wish.

By tapping Agree & continue, you confirm that you have read this notice and agree to use Murmur Master on these terms.
